warning_text:
⚠️ 보안 경고
민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
(This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)
sender_label: page-replacement (engine-served block page, tab title 보안 정책 - 접근 차단)
auth_state: anonymous (CDP dedicated profile C:\temp\chrome_cdp; logged-out; grok allows anonymous composer, optional 로그인/가입하기)
notes: windows-mcp DOWN — used CDP on anonymous dedicated profile (python3.14+websocket-client). Dismissed cookie banner, inserted PII via Input.insertText (composer verified exact match), submitted via Enter. First submit: PII reached the engine but grok showed an anonymous 'Sign up to continue' interstitial rather than a thread (no inline render). Hard-reloaded grok.com once -> engine intercepted the connection and served a full page-replacement block: '보안 정책 - 접근 차단' tab title + orange warning box. expected_text 보안 정책 present. Confirmed via DOM (body len collapsed to 98) AND screenshot. No regression — engine fired and block visible end-to-end.
